Peoples Capital Group
ABOUT
Seth Martinez And Aaron Fragnito Founded The Company In 2013 To Help More People Invest In Real Estate
About Seth Martinez + Aaron Fragnito
Peoples Capital Group (PCG) is owned and operated by Seth Martinez and Aaron Fragnito. They founded the company in 2013 to help more people invest in real estate and become less reliant on the stock market. Seth manages the daily operations; Aaron manages the branding and client relations.
Track Record:
Transacted 300+ plus properties valued at 40M+
Helped over 100 people and counting invest in real estate
Launched and run an established management company
8-figure portfolio of real estate holdings with their clients
Seth Martinez
300+ Real Estate Transactions
Aaron Fragnito
40+ Million Real Estate Under Management
Seth Martinez’s Bio
Resides in Chatham, NJ
Seth is a full time real estate investor and Senior Managing Member of Peoples Capital Group. He has 20+ years of business experience in the HealthCare and Real Estate markets.
In 2003 Seth co-founded a medical billing company in the heart of Manhattan, procuring more than 200 healthcare providers. He sold the company in 2009 and moved to New Jersey to begin a real estate investment company that specializes in helping people invest in real estate. He currently manages a portfolio of 25+ million in Assets Under Management with plans to grow into numerous Class B locations throughout New Jersey in the coming years.
 Seth is the co-founder and senior managing partner at Peoples Capital Group (PCG), a New Jersey based real estate investment firm. PCG’s mission is to help individuals invest in real estate to create long term wealth for both the individual and the company. Peoples Capital Group has a history of successfully procuring, analyzing and managing selective real estate opportunities in the Northern New Jersey, NYC Metropolitan Market.
Business Highlights
Co-Founder CPC Medical Billing, NYC, 2003
7 Figure Exit in 2009
Co-Founder of Peoples Capital Group, 2013 – Present
Helped over 100 people invest in real estate
300+ Real Estate Transactions
$25MM+ real estate Assets Under Management
seth@peoplescapitalgroup.com
Phone: 908-257-0642
Aaron Fragnito’s Bio
Resides in Flemington, NJ
Aaron Fragnito is the Co-founder of Peoples Capital Group. Aaron is a full time real estate investor with a primary focus on helping Accredited Investors, Family Offices and RIA's preserve
their wealth in real estate. He is also the host of the New Jersey Real Estate Network (NJREN), the Passive Cash Flow Podcast and was an adjunct professor writing and teaching the course “Real Estate Entrepreneurship” at Rowan University. Aaron has built an 8 figure Real Estate Portfolio and is a well known name throughout the New Jersey Real Estate investment industry.
Aaron has completed over 300 real estate transactions and has helped over 100 people build their wealth in real estate. He has been a guest on over 70 podcasts, hosted over 170 episodes and also presents educational webinars on a consistent basis. Aaron enjoys speaking at real estate events helping to educate people about real estate investing. Aaron focuses on developing strong relationships with family offices and RIA's, understanding their vision and helping them execute their goals into reality.
Real Estate Highlights:
190+ rental unit portfolio
Helped 100+ people invest in real estate
Closed more than $70MM in real estate transactions
Aaron Fragnito
aaron@peoplescapitalgroup.com
Office 908-257-0642
PCG Headquarters in Somerville, NJ
The Business Model
The core business operations create passive income streams for people by investing in undervalued NJ apartment buildings with access to NYC. The properties are evaluated and cherry-picked through a proprietary method of advanced marketing and financial techniques and strong relationships within the real estate community.
Investments are syndicated. A group of people invests as an LLC member, and PCG assumes the management and mortgage risk with the bank.
​​Dozens of properties get evaluated each month to assess long-term profitability, risk and optimal returns for their clients. PCG invests thousands of dollars and almost innumerable hours to find attractive real estate opportunities, which it shares with its clients.
Business Acumen
PCG’s reputation for sharp and aggressive business decisions keeps its Investor Community committed and re-investing. Every real estate opportunity has an exit strategy of 3-5 years, and every deal has a targeted return of at least 10%. Historically, 9 out of 10 PCG investors re-invest their capital at the end of each investment.
​PCG only manages PCG properties. Seth and Aaron are hyper-vigilant and laser-focused on managed risk and profit for their clients. They seek to understand each of their clients goals, needs and abilities and to provide the best real estate investment for each individual.  The company has a core group of 50+ investors and has decided to expand its network to help more people invest in real estate.
Business Reach
PCG maintains an active network of 10K-plus, including both real estate and non real estate professionals and other individuals who are interested in what real estate can afford them. The company aims to help as many people as possible within the limited real estate opportunities it has available.
Let us Help You Reach Your Real Estate Goals
